sentences.arabic: وَقَفَتِ الْأُمُّ أَمَامَ خَرِيطَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ عَلَى الْجِدَارِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je stajala ispred mape grada na zidu.
sentences.translationEn: The mother stood in front of the city map on the wall.

sentences.arabic: أَشَارَتْ إِلَى الْمَكَانِ الَّذِي تُرِيدُ زِيَارَتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Pokazala je na mjesto koje želi posjetiti.
sentences.translationEn: She pointed to the place she wanted to visit.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ لِأَبِيهَا: هَذَا الْحَدِيقَةُ قَرِيبَةٌ مِنَّا.
sentences.translation: Rekla je ocu: Ovaj park je blizu nas.
sentences.translationEn: She said to her father: This park is close to us.

sentences.translation: Hodali su do njega i proveli lijepo vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: They walked there and spent a nice time.
